cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14.0)

# trick to detect architecture (x86/arm64)
EXECUTE_PROCESS(COMMAND uname -m COMMAND tr -d '\n' OUTPUT_VARIABLE ARCHITECTURE)
#message(STATUS "Architecture: '${ARCHITECTURE}'")
#message(STATUS "-----------------------------> '${SMTG_MAC}'")

if(SMTG_LINUX)
	if (${ARCHITECTURE} STREQUAL "x86_64")
		set(BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_INCLUDE_DIR "linux_x86_64/include" PARENT_SCOPE)
		set(BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_LIB_DIR "linux_x86_64/lib" PARENT_SCOPE)
	#elseif(${ARCHITECTURE} STREQUAL "arm64")
	endif()
elseif(SMTG_MAC)
	if (${ARCHITECTURE} STREQUAL "x86_64")
		set(BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_INCLUDE_DIR "mac_x86_64/include" PARENT_SCOPE)
		set(BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_LIB_DIR "mac_x86_64/lib" PARENT_SCOPE)
	elseif(${ARCHITECTURE} STREQUAL "arm64")
		set(BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_INCLUDE_DIR "mac_arm64/include" PARENT_SCOPE)
		set(BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_LIB_DIR "mac_arm64/lib" PARENT_SCOPE)
	endif()
endif(SMTG_LINUX)
